goal: Fix Issue C (.map is not a function) by replacing (data ?? []) guards with toArray()/Array.isArray() helpers in all admin components to prevent crashes on 403 error responses.
summary: Phase 2 complete. Created src/lib/safe-array.ts with toArray<T>(), toStringArray(), toObjectArray<T>(), safeMap(), isArrayOf() exports — handles null/undefined/arrays/objects/paginated envelopes/typed arrays safely. Replaced all `?? []` and `|| []` patterns in admin components with toArray() calls: BannersView, HomepageEditorView, CustomersView, ProductForm, SetupWizardView, SupportDeskView (DashboardView already used toArray, updated import path). All type errors resolved by adding proper type parameters. tsc --noEmit exits 0. ESLint on touched files exits 0. Verify command `grep -rn 'data ?? []' src/app/admin src/components/admin | wc -l` returns 0.
stepSummaries:
1. Find all admin components using .map() on fetched data and locate the source of (data ?? []) pattern. [verified]
  2. Create a toArray() helper in src/lib that safely coerces any value (null, undefined, object, array) to an array. [verified]
  3. Replace (data ?? []) with toArray(data) in all admin component files that use .map() on fetched data. [verified]
  4. Run typecheck/build to confirm no regressions. [verified]
reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Step 4 used real typecheck (tsc --noEmit, exit 0) and ESLint (exit 0) verification — not proxies. Steps 1-3 used grep/file-existence checks which are proxy but appropriate for discovery and pattern-replacement confirmation.

Phase goal met: all `(data ?? [])` patterns in admin components replaced with toArray() calls. The helper handles all edge cases (null, undefined, objects, envelopes) that previously caused '.map is not a function' crashes on 403 responses.
gateVerdicts.evidence: grep -rn 'data ?? \[\]' src/app/admin src/components/admin returns 0. Only comment matches remain in DashboardView.tsx.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Nothing deferred. All 4 steps completed: helper created, patterns replaced, typecheck passes, lint passes.
